RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd, matplotlib.pyplot as plt, os, textwrap, numpy as np, seaborn as sns

path="/mnt/data/assistant-QyXmVAs3zaYyrXf76Zd4oV-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df=pd.read_csv(path)
df.columns

import matplotlib.ticker as mtick

# clean numeric
transport['operating_profit']=pd.to_numeric(transport['operating_profit'], errors='coerce')
plot_df=transport[['name','operating_profit']].sort_values('operating_profit',ascending=True)

plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))
sns.set_style("whitegrid")
ax=plt.barh(plot_df['name'], plot_df['operating_profit'], color="#2a9d8f")
plt.xlabel("Operating Profit")
plt.title("Transportation Sector: Operating Profit")
plt.tight_layout()
out_png="/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_barchart.png"
plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=200, bbox_inches="tight")
out_png

content.text:
I created a bar chart for **Operating Profit** in the **TRANSPORTATION** sector from your uploaded CSV.

Download the chart here: **[transportation_operating_profit_barchart.png](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_barchart.png)**
